case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS THOMAS, TUERE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,584.30 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, TUERE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, TUERE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-03-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-03-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, TUERE $4,584.30 PRINCIPAL, $40.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,624.80, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
